title: Welcome to SIG Card Management
subtitle: Your secure portal for managing business debit cards
bodyParagraphs: SIG Card Management provides controlling parties with a streamlined, secure interface to manage authorized signer debit cards across all your business banking accounts.
From activating new cards to resending PINs, every action is tracked and verified to ensure the highest level of security for your organization.

featureHighlights.title: Search & Select
featureHighlights.description: Quickly find authorized signers and their associated cards across all linked business accounts.

featureHighlights.title: Lock & Unlock Cards
featureHighlights.description: Instantly lock a compromised card or unlock one that was previously restricted — with built-in daily attempt limits for added security.

featureHighlights.title: Activate New Cards
featureHighlights.description: Activate newly issued debit cards for authorized signers with identity verification at every step.

featureHighlights.title: Replace Cards
featureHighlights.description: Initiate card replacements for lost, stolen, or damaged cards. The old card is automatically deactivated.

featureHighlights.title: Resend PINs
featureHighlights.description: Request a new PIN to be mailed to the cardholder's registered address when the original is lost or forgotten.

featureHighlights.title: Secure & Audited
featureHighlights.description: All actions require identity verification and are logged for compliance. Session timeouts and attempt limits protect against unauthorized use.

footerNote: Need help? Contact your system administrator or refer to the card management policy documentation.
